final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic illustration of the Tang Dynasty 长安 city during the Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩" (meticulous brushwork with heavy colors) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a long scroll format (长卷)
Subject: must include ten thousand lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night
Scene/backdrop: must include the Tang Dynasty 长安 city during the 元宵灯会 (Lantern Festival)
Lighting/mood: needs a night scene with countless lanterns illuminating the sky — exact light source distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a festive night direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
